title: Slovakian Winey Meal
description: A hearty Slovakian dish featuring tender meal and a rich, winey sauce. Perfect for a special occasion or a cozy night in.
instructions: 2. Cook the dense ingredient according to package instructions.
3. In a large skillet, heat some oil over medium-high heat. Add the meal and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the winey ingredient to the skillet and stir to deglaze.
5. Add the slovakian ingredient to the skillet and stir to combine.
6. Add the cooked dense ingredient to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with the gratin ingredient.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
